title: Knysna and Plett come to town at NSRI awards
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS – Two Garden Route...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS – Two Garden Route neighbours, Plettenberg Bay Station 14 and Knysna Station 12, have jointly scooped the National Sea Rescue Institute's (NSRI) award for the Best RIB Station in 2024.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS – Two Garden Route neighbours, Plettenberg Bay Station 14 and Knysna Station 12, have jointly scooped the National Sea Rescue Institute's (NSRI) award for the Best RIB Station in 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The award, presented on Friday 15 August at the 58th NSRI annual awards and AGM in Cape Town, are for the best rigid inflatable boat (RIB) station for the past year - with one of the criteria being successful rescues and response times.","html":"The award, presented on Friday 15 August at the 58th NSRI annual awards and AGM in Cape Town, are for the best rigid inflatable boat (RIB) station for the past year - with one of the criteria being successful rescues and response times."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The RIB craft are suited for coastal operations closer to shore.","html":"The RIB craft are suited for coastal operations closer to shore."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Heartbeat","html":"Heartbeat"},{"type":"paragraph","text":""Through seamless teamwork, strong community engagement, and unwavering operational standards, they have set a new benchmark," said Andrew Ingram, NSRI communications manager.","html":""Through seamless teamwork, strong community engagement, and unwavering operational standards, they have set a new benchmark," said Andrew Ingram, NSRI communications manager."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""Moreover, these flanking stations work collaboratively and are the true heartbeat of coastal preparedness in their region."","html":""Moreover, these flanking stations work collaboratively and are the true heartbeat of coastal preparedness in their region.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Station 12 previously won the award in 2015 and has received a Station Excellence award for the past 11 years.","html":"Station 12 previously won the award in 2015 and has received a Station Excellence award for the past 11 years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Criteria","html":"Criteria"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The best station award is allocated to a station based on the following criteria:","html":"The best station award is allocated to a station based on the following criteria:"},{"type":"list","items":["Successful rescues and response times","Has well-trained, disciplined, committed and happy crew","Takes pride in their assets and rescue base and maintain and care for them in the highest possible manner","Has strong leadership and administration management which sets the benchmark in operational excellence","Keeps a consistently good track record over the year, avoiding major issues, injuries, accidents and damages"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Long service","html":"Long service"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plettenberg Bay and Knysna members also received long service awards:","html":"Plettenberg Bay and Knysna members also received long service awards:"},{"type":"list","items":["20 years: Jaco Kruger (Plettenberg Bay), Tracy Meintjies (Plettenberg Bay) and Emily Bruwer (Knysna)","30 years: Laurent Eray (Plettenberg Bay)","40 years: Paul Jordaan (Plettenberg Bay)"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Positive","html":"Positive"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Station 21 commander Jerome Simonis said there definitely was no rivalry between the neighbours, but they are rather sharing the same mission and vision of the NSRI in the spirit of camaraderie.","html":"Station 21 commander Jerome Simonis said there definitely was no rivalry between the neighbours, but they are rather sharing the same mission and vision of the NSRI in the spirit of camaraderie."},{"type":"blockquote","text":""Station 14 (Plettenberg Bay) is an excellent station," he said. "Being in the same class as them is a great compliment. And if there was a big rescue, two well-trained stations would be working together, understanding each other and complimenting the rescue resources.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Station 14 commander Jaco Kruger said the joint award was very positive for the area and it was an honour to share the award with Knysna.","html":"Station 14 commander Jaco Kruger said the joint award was very positive for the area and it was an honour to share the award with Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Knysna and Plett come to town at NSRI awards
